title: aria angustata
intro: Aria angustata, also known as the Narrow-leaved Aria or Chinese Aria, is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aria angustata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Aria angustata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a balanced immune system.
